To address this gap, we present Touching Space, an end-to-end system that retrieves map data for a target place and loads it into a frontend interface for exploration. The system combines haptic and audio feedback: users explore spatial layouts through touch and ask spoken questions to a conversational agent during exploration. Touching Space contributes a conversational interface that supports BLV users in building cognitive maps on commodity hardware.

AI.tldr: 开发一个名为Touching Space的端到端系统，通过触觉和音频反馈帮助盲人和低视力用户在旅行前构建对陌生环境的整体空间认知地图
AI.motivation: 现有辅助导航工具主要提供实时引导，但缺乏支持盲人和低视力用户在旅行前构建整体空间理解的功能，认知地图构建在旅行规划中很重要但研究不足
AI.method: 系统检索目标地点的地图数据，加载到前端界面进行探索，结合触觉和音频反馈：用户通过触摸探索空间布局，并在探索过程中向对话代理提问
AI.result: 开发了Touching Space系统，这是一个支持盲人和低视力用户在商用硬件上构建认知地图的对话界面
AI.conclusion: Touching Space通过结合触觉和音频反馈的对话界面，填补了现有辅助导航工具在认知地图构建方面的空白，支持盲人和低视力用户在旅行前建立空间理解

title: A multi-platform LiDAR dataset for standardized forest inventory measurement at long term ecological monitoring sites
summary: We present a curated multi-platform LiDAR reference dataset from an instrumented ICOS forest plot, explicitly designed to support calibration, benchmarking, and integration of 3D structural data with ecological observations and standard allometric models. The dataset integrates UAV-borne laser scanning (ULS) to measure canopy coverage, terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) for detailed stem mapping, and backpack mobile laser scanning (MLS) with real-time SLAM for efficient sub-canopy acquisition. We focus on the control plot with the most complete and internally consistent registration, where TLS point clouds (~333 million points) are complemented by ULS and MLS data capturing canopy and understory strata. Marker-free, SLAM-aware protocols were used to reduce field and processing time, while manual and automated methods were combined. Final products are available in LAZ and E57 formats with UTM coordinates, together with registration reports for reproducibility. The dataset provides a benchmark for testing registration methods, evaluating scanning efficiency, and linking point clouds with segmentation, quantitative structure models, and allometric biomass estimation. By situating the acquisitions at a long-term ICOS site, it is explicitly linked to 3D structure with decades of ecological and flux measurements. More broadly, it illustrates how TLS, MLS, and ULS can be combined for repeated inventories and digital twins of forest ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多平台LiDAR参考数据集，用于标准化森林清查测量，支持3D结构数据与生态观测和标准异速生长模型的校准、基准测试和集成。
AI.motivation: 需要为长期生态监测站点提供标准化的多平台LiDAR数据集，以支持森林结构数据的校准、基准测试和生态观测集成，解决不同扫描平台数据整合的挑战。
AI.method: 集成无人机激光扫描(ULS)测量冠层覆盖、地面激光扫描(TLS)详细测绘树干、背包移动激光扫描(MLS)实时SLAM获取亚冠层数据，采用无标记SLAM感知协议减少处理时间。
AI.result: 创建了包含TLS约3.33亿点云的完整数据集，结合ULS和MLS数据捕获冠层和下层植被，提供LAZ和E57格式数据及配准报告，建立了多平台LiDAR基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为测试配准方法、评估扫描效率以及将点云与分割、定量结构模型和异速生长生物量估算联系起来提供了基准，展示了TLS、MLS和ULS如何结合用于重复清查和森林生态系统数字孪生。

title: Balancing Weights, Directed Sparsification, and Augmenting Paths
summary: We present a randomized augmenting paths-based algorithm to compute the maximum flow in a directed, uncapacitated graph in almost $m+nF$ time, matching the algorithm of Karger and Levine for undirected graphs (SICOMP 2015). Combined with an initial $\sqrt n$ rounds of blocking flow to reduce the value of $F$, we obtain a maximum flow algorithm with running time $mn^{1/2+o(1)}$. For combinatorial, augmenting paths-based algorithms, this is the first improvement over Dinic's algorithm for moderately sparse graphs. To obtain our algorithm, we introduce a new technique to re-weight the edges of a strongly connected directed graph so that each cut is approximately balanced: the total weight of edges in one direction is within a constant factor of the total weight in the other direction. We then adapt Karger and Levine's technique of sampling edges from the newly weighted residual graph, ensuring that an augmenting path exists in the sampled graph with high probability. One technical difficulty is that our balancing weights have to be dynamically maintained upon changes to the residual graph. Surprisingly, we can black box the dynamic data structure from the recent interior point method-based flow algorithm of van den Brand et al. (FOCS 2024).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于有向无容量限制图中最大流计算的随机增广路径算法，改进了Dinic算法在中等稀疏图上的性能。
AI.motivation: 针对有向图中最大流计算问题，现有组合增广路径算法（如Dinic算法）在中等稀疏图上性能有限，需要更高效的算法来匹配无向图中Karger和Levine算法的性能。
AI.method: 引入新的边重加权技术使强连通有向图中每个割近似平衡，然后采用Karger和Levine的边采样技术，结合动态数据结构维护权重变化，并加入初始阻塞流减少流值。
AI.result: 算法在几乎m+nF时间内计算有向无容量限制图的最大流，结合初始阻塞流后达到mn^{1/2+o(1)}的运行时间，这是组合增广路径算法对Dinic算法的首次改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过平衡权重、有向稀疏化和增广路径技术的结合，成功将有向图中的最大流计算效率提升到与无向图算法相当的水平，为组合流算法提供了新的技术突破。

title: High-Speed Full-Color HDR Imaging via Unwrapping Modulo-Encoded Spike Streams
summary: Conventional RGB-based high dynamic range (HDR) imaging faces a fundamental trade-off between motion artifacts in multi-exposure captures and irreversible information loss in single-shot techniques. Modulo sensors offer a promising alternative by encoding theoretically unbounded dynamic range into wrapped measurements. However, existing modulo solutions remain bottlenecked by iterative unwrapping overhead and hardware constraints limiting them to low-speed, grayscale capture. In this work, we present a complete modulo-based HDR imaging system that enables high-speed, full-color HDR acquisition by synergistically advancing both the sensing formulation and the unwrapping algorithm. At the core of our approach is an exposure-decoupled formulation of modulo imaging that allows multiple measurements to be interleaved in time, preserving a clean, observation-wise measurement model. Building upon this, we introduce an iteration-free unwrapping algorithm that integrates diffusion-based generative priors with the physical least absolute remainder property of modulo images, supporting highly efficient, physics-consistent HDR reconstruction. Finally, to validate the practical viability of our system, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept hardware implementation based on modulo-encoded spike streams. This setup preserves the native high temporal resolution of spike cameras, achieving 1000 FPS full-color imaging while reducing output data bandwidth from approximately 20 Gbps to 6 Gbps. Extensive evaluations indicate that our coordinated approach successfully overcomes key systemic bottlenecks, demonstrating the feasibility of deploying modulo imaging in dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于模数编码的高速全彩色高动态范围成像系统，通过解包模数编码的脉冲流实现1000 FPS的HDR成像
AI.motivation: 传统RGB HDR成像面临多曝光运动伪影和单次拍摄信息丢失的权衡，现有模数解决方案受限于迭代解包开销和硬件限制，只能实现低速灰度捕获
AI.method: 提出曝光解耦的模数成像公式，允许时间交错的多重测量；开发基于扩散生成先验和模数图像最小绝对余数特性的免迭代解包算法；构建基于模数编码脉冲流的硬件原型
AI.result: 系统实现1000 FPS全彩色成像，输出数据带宽从约20 Gbps降至6 Gbps，成功克服系统瓶颈，验证了模数成像在动态场景中的可行性
AI.conclusion: 通过协同推进传感公式和解包算法，构建了完整的高速全彩色HDR成像系统，为模数成像在动态场景中的部署提供了可行方案

title: StoryCoder: Narrative Reformulation for Structured Reasoning in LLM Code Generation
summary: Effective code generation requires both model capability and a problem representation that carefully structures how models reason and plan. Existing approaches augment reasoning steps or inject specific structure into how models think, but leave scattered problem conditions unchanged. Inspired by the way humans organize fragmented information into coherent explanations, we propose StoryCoder, a narrative reformulation framework that transforms code generation questions into coherent natural language narratives, providing richer contextual structure than simple rephrasings. Each narrative consists of three components: a task overview, constraints, and example test cases, guided by the selected algorithm and genre. Experiments across 11 models on HumanEval, LiveCodeBench, and CodeForces demonstrate consistent improvements, with an average gain of 18.7% in zero-shot pass@10. Beyond accuracy, our analyses reveal that narrative reformulation guides models toward correct algorithmic strategies, reduces implementation errors, and induces a more modular code structure. The analyses further show that these benefits depend on narrative coherence and genre alignment, suggesting that structured problem representation is important for code generation regardless of model scale or architecture. Our code is available at https://github.com/gu-ni/StoryCoder.

AI.tldr: 提出StoryCoder框架，将代码生成问题转化为连贯的自然语言叙事，以提升大语言模型在代码生成中的结构化推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅增强推理步骤或注入特定结构，但未改变分散的问题条件。受人类将碎片化信息组织成连贯解释的启发，需要更丰富的上下文结构来改进代码生成。
AI.method: 提出叙事重构框架，将代码生成问题转化为包含任务概述、约束条件和示例测试用例三个组件的连贯自然语言叙事，并基于选定算法和类型进行指导。
AI.result: 在HumanEval、LiveCodeBench和CodeForces数据集上对11个模型进行实验，平均零样本pass@10提升18.7%。叙事重构引导模型采用正确算法策略，减少实现错误，并产生更模块化的代码结构。
AI.conclusion: 叙事重构通过提供结构化问题表示显著提升代码生成性能，其效果依赖于叙事的连贯性和类型对齐，表明结构化问题表示对代码生成至关重要，与模型规模或架构无关。

title: CMTM: Cross-Modal Token Modulation for Unsupervised Video Object Segmentation
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE ICIP 2025
summary: Recent advances in unsupervised video object segmentation have highlighted the potential of two-stream architectures that integrate appearance and motion cues. However, fully leveraging these complementary sources of information requires effectively modeling their interdependencies. In this paper, we introduce cross-modality token modulation, a novel approach designed to strengthen the interaction between appearance and motion cues. Our method establishes dense connections between tokens from each modality, enabling efficient intra-modal and inter-modal information propagation through relation transformer blocks. To improve learning efficiency, we incorporate a token masking strategy that addresses the limitations of relying solely on increased model complexity. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across all public benchmarks, outperforming existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出CMTM方法用于无监督视频对象分割，通过跨模态令牌调制增强外观和运动线索的交互
AI.motivation: 现有双流架构虽能整合外观和运动线索，但未能充分利用它们的互补性，需要更有效地建模模态间依赖关系
AI.method: 提出跨模态令牌调制方法，建立模态间密集连接，通过关系Transformer块实现模态内和模态间信息传播，并引入令牌掩码策略提高学习效率
AI.result: 在所有公共基准测试中达到最先进的性能，优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: CMTM方法通过增强外观和运动线索的交互，有效提升了无监督视频对象分割的性能，无需依赖模型复杂度增加

title: Switch-KD: Visual-Switch Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in joint vision-language understanding, but their large scale poses significant challenges for deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Knowledge Distillation (KD) offers a viable way to improve model capabilities without increasing model size or data requirements, making deployment more efficient. However, applying KD to VLMs is challenged by modality-specific supervision: although multimodal knowledge in VLMs is fused within the language space, current methods supervise each modality separately without explicitly addressing multimodal alignment, leading to inconsistent multimodal knowledge transfer. To address this, we propose Switch-KD, a visual-switch distillation framework that unifies vision-language knowledge transfer within a shared text-probability space. Switch-KD comprises two key components: (1) Visual-Switch Distillation, which switches the student's visual outputs into the teacher's language pathway to construct cross-modal probabilistic references for implicit visual knowledge transfer; and (2) Dynamic Bi-directional Logits Difference (DBiLD) loss, which adaptively aligns informative probability regions while preserving the distributional structures of teacher and student through bidirectional supervision. Guided by Switch-KD, a 0.5B TinyLLaVA effectively distills rich multimodal knowledge from its 3B teacher, yielding an average improvement of 3.6 points across 10 multimodal benchmarks without any architectural modification.

AI.tldr: 提出Switch-KD视觉切换知识蒸馏框架，用于在视觉语言模型中实现跨模态知识迁移，解决多模态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型规模庞大，在资源受限场景部署困难。现有知识蒸馏方法在多模态监督中存在模态分离问题，缺乏显式的多模态对齐，导致知识迁移不一致。
AI.method: 提出视觉切换蒸馏和动态双向对数差异损失两个关键组件：前者将学生视觉输出切换到教师语言路径构建跨模态概率参考；后者自适应对齐信息概率区域并保持分布结构。
AI.result: 0.5B参数的TinyLLaVA模型从3B参数教师模型中有效蒸馏多模态知识，在10个多模态基准上平均提升3.6分，无需架构修改。
AI.conclusion: Switch-KD框架成功解决了视觉语言模型知识蒸馏中的多模态对齐问题，实现了高效的多模态知识迁移，为资源受限场景下的模型部署提供了有效方案。

title: A Parallel Approach to Counting Exact Covers Based on Decomposability Property
summary: The exact cover problem is a classical NP-hard problem with broad applications in the area of AI. Algorithm DXZ is a method to count exact covers representing by zero-suppressed binary decision diagrams (ZBDDs). In this paper, we propose a zero-suppressed variant of decision decomposable negation normal form (in short, decision-ZDNNF), which is strictly more succinct than ZBDDs. We then design a novel parallel algorithm, namely DXD, which constructs a decision-ZDNNF representing the set of all exact covers. Furthermore, we improve DXD by dynamically updating connected components. The experimental results demonstrate that the improved DXD algorithm outperforms all of state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可分解性的并行精确覆盖计数方法，通过引入决策-ZDNNF表示形式来改进现有算法。
AI.motivation: 精确覆盖问题是NP难问题，在人工智能领域有广泛应用。现有DXZ算法使用ZBDD表示，但存在表示效率限制，需要更紧凑的表示形式和更高效的并行算法。
AI.method: 提出决策-ZDNNF表示形式，比ZBDD更简洁；设计DXD并行算法构建决策-ZDNNF表示所有精确覆盖；通过动态更新连通分量进一步改进算法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，改进后的DXD算法在性能上超越了所有现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 决策-ZDNNF是比ZBDD更紧凑的表示形式，基于此设计的并行DXD算法在精确覆盖计数问题上表现出优越性能。

title: ELMoE-3D: Leveraging Intrinsic Elasticity of MoE for Hybrid-Bonding-Enabled Self-Speculative Decoding in On-Premises Serving
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become the dominant architecture for large-scale language models, yet on-premises serving remains fundamentally memory-bound as batching turns sparse per-token compute into dense memory activation. Memory-centric architectures (PIM, NMP) improve bandwidth but leave compute underutilized under MoE's low arithmetic intensity at high batch sizes. Speculative decoding (SD) trades idle compute for fewer target invocations, yet verification must load experts even for rejected tokens, severely limiting its benefit in MoE especially at low batch sizes. We propose ELMoE-3D, a hybrid-bonding (HB)-based HW-SW co-designed framework that unifies cache-based acceleration and speculative decoding to offer overall speedup across batch sizes. We identify two intrinsic elasticity axes of MoE-expert and bit-and jointly scale them to construct Elastic Self-Speculative Decoding (Elastic-SD), which serves as both an expert cache and a strongly aligned self-draft model accelerated by high HB bandwidth. Our LSB-augmented bit-sliced architecture exploits inherent redundancy in bit-slice representations to natively support bit-nested execution. On our 3D-stacked hardware, ELMoE-3D achieves an average $6.6\times$ speedup and $4.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over naive MoE serving on xPU across batch sizes 1-16, and delivers $2.2\times$ speedup and $1.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over the best-performing prior accelerator baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出ELMoE-3D框架，通过混合键合技术实现MoE模型在本地部署中的自推测解码加速
AI.motivation: MoE模型在本地部署中存在内存瓶颈，传统推测解码在MoE中效果有限，需要新的硬件软件协同设计来提升性能
AI.method: 结合混合键合技术，提出弹性自推测解码方法，利用MoE的专家和比特弹性，通过LSB增强的比特切片架构支持比特嵌套执行
AI.result: 在3D堆叠硬件上，相比朴素MoE服务获得平均6.6倍加速和4.4倍能效提升，优于现有最佳加速器基线
AI.conclusion: ELMoE-3D通过硬件软件协同设计，有效解决了MoE模型本地部署的内存瓶颈问题，显著提升了推理性能和能效

title: Asking What Matters: Reward-Driven Clarification for Software Engineering Tasks
summary: Humans often specify tasks incompletely, so assistants must know when and how to ask clarifying questions. However, effective clarification remains challenging in software engineering tasks as not all missing information is equally valuable, and questions must target information users can realistically provide. We study clarification in real software engineering tasks by quantifying which types of information most affect task success and which questions elicit useful responses from simulated users. Using Shapley attribution and distributional comparisons, we identify two key properties of effective clarification: task relevance (which information predicts success) and user answerability (what users can realistically provide). We operationalize these properties as multi-stage reinforcement learning rewards to train CLARITI, an 8B-parameter clarification module, that matches GPT-5's resolution rate on underspecified issues while generating 41% fewer questions. Our results suggest that grounding reward design in empirical analysis of information impact and user answerability improves clarification efficiency.

AI.tldr: 研究软件工程任务中如何有效提出澄清问题，通过量化哪些缺失信息对任务成功影响最大，以及哪些问题能获得用户有用回答。
AI.motivation: 人类经常不完整地指定任务，助手需要知道何时以及如何提出澄清问题。在软件工程任务中，并非所有缺失信息都同等重要，问题必须针对用户实际能提供的信息。
AI.method: 使用Shapley归因和分布比较分析信息影响，识别任务相关性和用户可回答性两个关键属性，将其作为多阶段强化学习奖励来训练CLARITI（8B参数澄清模块）。
AI.result: CLARITI在未明确指定问题上达到GPT-5的解决率，同时生成的问题数量减少41%。基于信息影响和用户可回答性的奖励设计提高了澄清效率。
AI.conclusion: 将奖励设计基于信息影响和用户可回答性的实证分析，能够显著提高软件工程任务中澄清问题的效率，减少不必要的提问同时保持高解决率。

title: Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning and Tri-Token Prompt Learning Embraced High-Order RWKV for Pan-Sharpening
summary: In this work, we propose a Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning paradigm for pan-sharpening, built upon a high-order RWKV architecture and a tri-token prompting mechanism derived from semantic clustering. Specifically, our method contains three key components: 1) Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning. Although RWKV offers a efficient linear-complexity alternative to Transformers, its conventional bidirectional raster scanning is still semantic-agnostic and prone to positional bias. To address this issue, we introduce a semantic-driven scanning strategy that leverages locality-sensitive hashing to group semantically related regions and construct multi-grain semantic prototypes, enabling context-aware token reordering and more coherent global interaction. 2) Tri-token Prompt Learning. We design a tri-token prompting mechanism consisting of a global token, cluster-derived prototype tokens, and a learnable register token. The global and prototype tokens provide complementary semantic priors for RWKV modeling, while the register token helps suppress noisy and artifact-prone intermediate representations. 3) Invertible Q-Shift. To counteract spatial details, we apply center difference convolution on the value pathway to inject high-frequency information, and introduce an invertible multi-scale Q-shift operation for efficient and lossless feature transformation without parameter-heavy receptive field expansion. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于全色锐化的多粒度感知语义原型扫描范式，基于高阶RWKV架构和语义聚类衍生的三令牌提示机制。
AI.motivation: 虽然RWKV提供了Transformer的高效线性复杂度替代方案，但其传统的双向光栅扫描仍然是语义无关的且容易产生位置偏差。需要解决这一问题以实现更连贯的全局交互。
AI.method: 包含三个关键组件：1)多粒度感知语义原型扫描，利用局部敏感哈希对语义相关区域分组；2)三令牌提示学习机制，包含全局令牌、聚类原型令牌和可学习寄存器令牌；3)可逆Q-Shift操作，通过中心差分卷积注入高频信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在性能上具有优越性，能够有效提升全色锐化的效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多粒度感知语义原型扫描范式和三令牌提示学习机制结合高阶RWKV架构，能够有效解决传统扫描方法的语义无关性和位置偏差问题，实现更优的全色锐化性能。

title: The Acoustic Camouflage Phenomenon: Re-evaluating Speech Features for Financial Risk Prediction
summary: In computational paralinguistics, detecting cognitive load and deception from speech signals is a heavily researched domain. Recent efforts have attempted to apply these acoustic frameworks to corporate earnings calls to predict catastrophic stock market volatility. In this study, we empirically investigate the limits of acoustic feature extraction (pitch, jitter, and hesitation) when applied to highly trained speakers in in-the-wild teleconference environments. Utilizing a two-stream late-fusion architecture, we contrast an acoustic-based stream with a baseline Natural Language Processing (NLP) stream. The isolated NLP model achieved a recall of 66.25% for tail-risk downside events. Surprisingly, integrating acoustic features via late fusion significantly degraded performance, reducing recall to 47.08%. We identify this degradation as Acoustic Camouflage, where media-trained vocal regulation introduces contradictory noise that disrupts multimodal meta-learners. We present these findings as a boundary condition for speech processing applications in high-stakes financial forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究语音特征在金融风险预测中的应用，特别是探究在真实电话会议环境中，经过媒体训练的高管语音特征提取的局限性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是评估语音特征提取（如音高、抖动和犹豫）在预测股市极端波动事件中的有效性，特别是在高管经过媒体训练的真实电话会议环境中。
AI.method: 采用双流后期融合架构，对比基于语音特征的流与基于自然语言处理的基线流，分析语音特征对金融风险预测模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 单独的自然语言处理模型对尾部风险下跌事件的召回率达到66.25%，但通过后期融合整合语音特征后，召回率显著下降至47.08%，表明语音特征引入噪声而非有用信息。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现"声学伪装"现象，即经过媒体训练的语音调节会引入矛盾噪声，破坏多模态元学习器性能，为高风险金融预测中的语音处理应用设定了边界条件。

title: Retrieve, Then Classify: Corpus-Grounded Automation of Clinical Value Set Authoring
summary: Clinical value set authoring -- the task of identifying all codes in a standardized vocabulary that define a clinical concept -- is a recurring bottleneck in clinical quality measurement and phenotyping. A natural approach is to prompt a large language model (LLM) to generate the required codes directly, but structured clinical vocabularies are large, version-controlled, and not reliably memorized during pretraining. We propose Retrieval-Augmented Set Completion (RASC): retrieve the $K$ most similar existing value sets from a curated corpus to form a candidate pool, then apply a classifier to each candidate code. Theoretically, retrieve-and-select can reduce statistical complexity by shrinking the effective output space from the full vocabulary to a much smaller retrieved candidate pool. We demonstrate the utility of RASC on 11,803 publicly available VSAC value sets, constructing the first large-scale benchmark for this task. A cross-encoder fine-tuned on SAPBert achieves AUROC~0.852 and value-set-level F1~0.298, outperforming a simpler three-layer Multilayer Perceptron (AUROC~0.799, F1~0.250) and both reduce the number of irrelevant candidates per true positive from 12.3 (retrieval-only) to approximately 3.2 and 4.4 respectively. Zero-shot GPT-4o achieves value-set-level F1~0.105, with 48.6\% of returned codes absent from VSAC entirely. This performance gap widens with increasing value set size, consistent with RASC's theoretical advantage. We observe similar performance gains across two other classifier model types, namely a cross-encoder initialized from pre-trained SAPBert and a LightGBM model, demonstrating that RASC's benefits extend beyond a single model class. The code to download and create the benchmark dataset, as well as the model training code is available at: \href{https://github.com/mukhes3/RASC}{https://github.com/mukhes3/RASC}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RASC（检索增强集补全）的方法，用于自动化临床价值集创作任务，即从标准化词汇表中识别定义临床概念的所有代码。
AI.motivation: 临床价值集创作是临床质量测量和表型分析中的瓶颈任务。虽然可以直接使用大语言模型生成代码，但结构化临床词汇表规模大、版本控制严格，且预训练时无法可靠记忆。需要一种更有效的方法来减少输出空间并提高准确性。
AI.method: 提出RASC方法：首先从精心策划的语料库中检索K个最相似的现有价值集形成候选池，然后对每个候选代码应用分类器。该方法理论上通过将有效输出空间从完整词汇表缩小到较小的检索候选池来降低统计复杂度。
AI.result: 在11,803个公开可用的VSAC价值集上进行测试，基于SAPBert微调的交叉编码器达到AUROC~0.852和价值集级F1~0.298，优于三层MLP（AUROC~0.799，F1~0.250）。零样本GPT-4o仅达到F1~0.105，且48.6%的返回代码完全不在VSAC中。RASC将每个真阳性的无关候选数量从12.3（仅检索）减少到约3.2-4.4。
AI.conclusion: RASC方法通过检索然后分类的策略，显著提高了临床价值集创作的自动化性能，特别是在处理大规模价值集时表现出理论优势。该方法的好处不仅限于单一模型类别，为临床信息学中的标准化任务提供了有效的解决方案。

authors: et al. (3 additional authors not shown)
title: CoDaS: AI Co-Data-Scientist for Biomarker Discovery via Wearable Sensors
summary: Scientific discovery in digital health requires converting continuous physiological signals from wearable devices into clinically actionable biomarkers. We introduce CoDaS (AI Co-Data-Scientist), a multi-agent system that structures biomarker discovery as an iterative process combining hypothesis generation, statistical analysis, adversarial validation, and literature-grounded reasoning with human oversight using large-scale wearable datasets. Across three cohorts totaling 9,279 participant-observations, CoDaS identified 41 candidate digital biomarkers for mental health and 25 for metabolic outcomes, each subjected to an internal validation battery spanning replication, stability, robustness, and discriminative power. Across two independent depression cohorts, CoDaS surfaced circadian instability-related features in both datasets, reflected in sleep duration variability (DWB, ρ= 0.252, p < 0.001) and sleep onset variability (GLOBEM, ρ= 0.126, p < 0.001). In a metabolic cohort, CoDaS derived a cardiovascular fitness index (steps/resting heart rate; ρ= -0.374, p < 0.001), and recovered established clinical associations, including the hepatic function ratio (AST/ALT; ρ= -0.375, p < 0.001), a known correlate of insulin resistance. Incorporating CoDaS-derived features alongside demographic variables led to modest but consistent improvements in predictive performance, with cross-validated ΔR^2 increases of 0.040 for depression and 0.021 for insulin resistance. These findings suggest that CoDaS enables systematic and traceable hypothesis generation and prioritization for biomarker discovery from large-scale wearable data.

AI.tldr: 开发一个名为CoDaS的多智能体AI系统，用于从大规模可穿戴设备数据中系统性地发现临床可用的数字生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 数字健康领域的科学发现需要将可穿戴设备的连续生理信号转化为临床可操作的生物标志物，但目前缺乏系统化的发现方法。
AI.method: CoDaS是一个多智能体系统，采用迭代流程结合假设生成、统计分析、对抗验证和基于文献的推理，并加入人工监督，处理大规模可穿戴数据集。
AI.result: 在总计9,279名参与者的三个队列中，CoDaS识别出41个心理健康候选生物标志物和25个代谢结果候选标志物。在抑郁队列中发现昼夜节律不稳定性相关特征，在代谢队列中推导出心血管健康指数并恢复已知临床关联。加入CoDaS特征后预测性能有适度但一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: CoDaS能够从大规模可穿戴数据中实现系统化、可追溯的假设生成和优先级排序，为生物标志物发现提供有效工具。

title: Tight Bounds for Learning Polyhedra with a Margin
summary: We give an algorithm for PAC learning intersections of $k$ halfspaces with a $ρ$ margin to within error $\varepsilon$ that runs in time $\textsf{poly}(k, \varepsilon^{-1}, ρ^{-1}) \cdot \exp \left(O(\sqrt{n \log(1/ρ) \log k})\right)$. Notably, this improves on prior work which had an exponential dependence on either $k$ or $ρ^{-1}$ and matches known cryptographic and Statistical Query lower bounds up to the logarithmic factors in $k$ and $ρ$ in the exponent. Our learning algorithm extends to the more general setting when we are only promised that most points have distance at least $ρ$ from the boundary of the polyhedron, making it applicable to continuous distributions as well.

AI.tldr: 提出一种算法用于PAC学习具有边距ρ的k个半空间交集，误差为ε
AI.motivation: 先前工作对k或ρ⁻¹存在指数依赖，需要改进算法复杂度以匹配已知密码学和统计查询下界
AI.method: 开发运行时间为poly(k, ε⁻¹, ρ⁻¹)·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))的算法，扩展到大多数点距离多面体边界至少ρ的更一般设置
AI.result: 算法改进了先前工作的指数依赖，匹配已知下界至对数因子，适用于连续分布
AI.conclusion: 该算法在PAC学习具有边距的多面体问题上达到了紧界，解决了先前工作的复杂度限制问题

title: Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion
summary: Learning Path Recommendation (LPR) is critical for personalized education, yet current methods often fail to account for historical interaction uncertainty (e.g., lucky guesses or accidental slips) and lack adaptability to diverse learning goals. We propose U-GLAD (Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion). To address representation bias, the framework models cognitive states as probability distributions, capturing the learner's underlying true state via a Gaussian LSTM. To ensure highly personalized recommendation, a goal-oriented concept encoder utilizes multi-head attention and objective-specific transformations to dynamically align concept semantics with individual learning goals, generating uniquely tailored embeddings. Unlike traditional discriminative ranking approaches, our model employs a generative diffusion model to predict the latent representation of the next optimal concept. Extensive evaluations on three public datasets demonstrate that U-GLAD significantly outperforms representative baselines. Further analyses confirm its superior capability in perceiving interaction uncertainty and providing stable, goal-driven recommendation paths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性感知的生成式学习路径推荐方法，主要任务是解决个性化教育中的学习路径推荐问题，通过建模历史交互的不确定性和适应不同的学习目标来提供更精准的推荐。
AI.motivation: 当前学习路径推荐方法存在两个主要问题：一是未能充分考虑历史交互中的不确定性（如侥幸猜对或意外失误），二是缺乏对不同学习目标的适应性。这些局限性影响了推荐的准确性和个性化程度。
AI.method: 提出了U-GLAD框架，包含三个核心组件：1）使用高斯LSTM将认知状态建模为概率分布，捕捉学习者的真实状态；2）采用目标导向的概念编码器，通过多头注意力和目标特定变换动态对齐概念语义与个人学习目标；3）使用生成式扩散模型预测下一个最优概念的潜在表示，而非传统的判别式排序方法。
AI.result: 在三个公共数据集上的广泛评估表明，U-GLAD显著优于代表性基线方法。进一步分析证实了其在感知交互不确定性和提供稳定、目标驱动的推荐路径方面的卓越能力。
AI.conclusion: U-GLAD通过建模认知状态的不确定性、动态适应学习目标以及采用生成式扩散方法，为学习路径推荐提供了更准确、个性化和稳定的解决方案，在个性化教育领域具有重要应用价值。

title: El Agente Forjador: Task-Driven Agent Generation for Quantum Simulation
summary: AI for science promises to accelerate the discovery process. The advent of large language models (LLMs) and agentic workflows enables the expediting of a growing range of scientific tasks. However, most of the current generation of agentic systems depend on static, hand-curated toolsets that hinder adaptation to new domains and evolving libraries. We present El Agente Forjador, a multi-agent framework in which universal coding agents autonomously forge, validate, and reuse computational tools through a four-stage workflow of tool analysis, tool generation, task execution, and iterative solution evaluation. Evaluated across 24 tasks spanning quantum chemistry and quantum dynamics on five coding agent setups, we compare three operating modes: zero-shot generation of tools per task, reuse of a curriculum-built toolset, and direct problem-solving with the coding agents as the baseline. We find that our tool generation and reuse framework consistently improves accuracy over the baseline. We also show that reusing a toolset built by a stronger coding agent can reduce API cost and substantially raises the solution quality for weaker coding agents. Case studies further demonstrate that tools forged for different domains can be combined to solve hybrid tasks. Taken together, these results show that LLM-based agents can use their scientific knowledge and coding capabilities to autonomously build reusable scientific tools, pointing toward a paradigm in which agent capabilities are defined by the tasks they are designed to solve rather than by explicitly engineered implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出El Agente Forjador多智能体框架，通过自主生成、验证和重用计算工具来加速量子模拟任务，实现任务驱动的智能体能力定义。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的智能体系统依赖静态、手动策划的工具集，难以适应新领域和不断演化的库，限制了科学任务的加速发现过程。
AI.method: 提出四阶段工作流：工具分析、工具生成、任务执行和迭代解决方案评估，让通用编码智能体自主锻造、验证和重用计算工具。
AI.result: 在24个量子化学和量子动力学任务上评估，工具生成和重用框架相比基线持续提升准确性；重用由更强编码智能体构建的工具集可降低API成本并显著提升较弱智能体的解决方案质量。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型智能体可以利用其科学知识和编码能力自主构建可重用的科学工具，指向一种新范式：智能体能力由其设计解决的任务定义，而非显式工程实现。

title: GDPR Auto-Formalization with AI Agents and Human Verification
summary: We study the overall process of automatic formalization of GDPR provisions using large language models, within a human-in-the-loop verification framework. Rather than aiming for full autonomy, we adopt a role-specialized workflow in which LLM-based AI components, operating in a multi-agent setting with iterative feedback, generate legal scenarios, formal rules, and atomic facts. This is coupled with independent verification modules which include human reviewers' assessment of representational, logical, and legal correctness. Using this approach, we construct a high-quality dataset to be used for GDPR auto-formalization, and analyze both successful and problematic cases. Our results show that structured verification and targeted human oversight are essential for reliable legal formalization, especially in the presence of legal nuance and context-sensitive reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究使用大型语言模型在人工验证框架下自动形式化GDPR条款的整体过程
AI.motivation: 实现GDPR条款的可靠自动形式化，解决法律文本中存在的细微差别和上下文敏感推理问题
AI.method: 采用角色专业化工作流程，在多智能体设置中使用LLM生成法律场景、形式规则和原子事实，结合独立验证模块和人工评审
AI.result: 构建了高质量的GDPR自动形式化数据集，分析了成功和问题案例，证明了结构化验证和针对性人工监督的重要性
AI.conclusion: 结构化验证和针对性人工监督对于可靠的法律形式化至关重要，特别是在存在法律细微差别和上下文敏感推理的情况下

title: Towards Design Compositing
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop on CVEU
summary: Graphic design creation involves harmoniously assembling multimodal components such as images, text, logos, and other visual assets collected from diverse sources, into a visually-appealing and cohesive design. Recent methods have largely focused on layout prediction or complementary element generation, while retaining input elements exactly, implicitly assuming that provided components are already stylistically harmonious. In practice, inputs often come from disparate sources and exhibit visual mismatch, making this assumption limiting. We argue that identity-preserving stylization and compositing of input elements is a critical missing ingredient for truly harmonized components-to-design pipelines. To this end, we propose GIST, a training-free, identity-preserving image compositor that sits between layout prediction and typography generation, and can be plugged into any existing components-to-design or design-refining pipeline without modification. We demonstrate this by integrating GIST with two substantially different existing methods, LaDeCo and Design-o-meter. GIST shows significant improvements in visual harmony and aesthetic quality across both pipelines, as validated by LLaVA-OV and GPT-4V on aspect-wise ratings and pairwise preference over naive pasting. Project Page: abhinav-mahajan10.github.io/GIST/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIST方法，解决图形设计中多模态组件（图像、文本、logo等）从不同来源收集时存在的视觉不匹配问题，实现身份保持的风格化与合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注布局预测或互补元素生成，但假设输入组件已经风格和谐。实际上输入组件常来自不同来源，存在视觉不匹配，这限制了现有方法的实用性。
AI.method: 提出GIST，一种无需训练、身份保持的图像合成器，位于布局预测和排版生成之间，可无缝集成到现有的组件到设计或设计优化流程中。
AI.result: 将GIST集成到LaDeCo和Design-o-meter两种不同方法中，通过LLaVA-OV和GPT-4V评估显示，在视觉和谐度和美学质量方面相比简单粘贴有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: GIST填补了组件到设计流程中身份保持风格化与合成的关键空白，可提升现有设计管道的视觉和谐度与美学质量，无需修改现有系统。

title: Hijacking Large Audio-Language Models via Context-Agnostic and Imperceptible Auditory Prompt Injection
summary: Modern Large audio-language models (LALMs) power intelligent voice interactions by tightly integrating audio and text. This integration, however, expands the attack surface beyond text and introduces vulnerabilities in the continuous, high-dimensional audio channel. While prior work studied audio jailbreaks, the security risks of malicious audio injection and downstream behavior manipulation remain underexamined. In this work, we reveal a previously overlooked threat, auditory prompt injection, under realistic constraints of audio data-only access and strong perceptual stealth. To systematically analyze this threat, we propose \textit{AudioHijack}, a general framework that generates context-agnostic and imperceptible adversarial audio to hijack LALMs. \textit{AudioHijack} employs sampling-based gradient estimation for end-to-end optimization across diverse models, bypassing non-differentiable audio tokenization. Through attention supervision and multi-context training, it steers model attention toward adversarial audio and generalizes to unseen user contexts. We also design a convolutional blending method that modulates perturbations into natural reverberation, making them highly imperceptible to users. Extensive experiments on 13 state-of-the-art LALMs show consistent hijacking across 6 misbehavior categories, achieving average success rates of 79\%-96\% on unseen user contexts with high acoustic fidelity. Real-world studies demonstrate that commercial voice agents from Mistral AI and Microsoft Azure can be induced to execute unauthorized actions on behalf of users. These findings expose critical vulnerabilities in LALMs and highlight the urgent need for dedicated defense.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AudioHijack框架，通过生成上下文无关且难以察觉的对抗性音频来劫持大型音频语言模型，揭示音频提示注入的安全威胁。
AI.motivation: 现代大型音频语言模型通过紧密集成音频和文本实现智能语音交互，但这种集成扩展了攻击面，引入了连续高维音频通道的漏洞。先前研究关注音频越狱，但恶意音频注入和下游行为操纵的安全风险尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出AudioHijack框架，采用基于采样的梯度估计进行端到端优化，绕过不可微的音频标记化；通过注意力监督和多上下文训练引导模型注意力；设计卷积混合方法将扰动调制为自然混响，提高不可察觉性。
AI.result: 在13个最先进的大型音频语言模型上进行实验，在6个不当行为类别中实现一致劫持，对未见用户上下文达到79%-96%的平均成功率；真实世界研究表明Mistral AI和Microsoft Azure的商业语音代理可被诱导执行未经授权的用户操作。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了大型音频语言模型的关键漏洞，暴露了音频提示注入的安全威胁，强调了对专用防御措施的迫切需求。

title: CausalDetox: Causal Head Selection and Intervention for Language Model Detoxification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate toxic content, posing significant risks for safe deployment. Current mitigation strategies often degrade generation quality or require costly human annotation. We propose CAUSALDETOX, a framework that identifies and intervenes on the specific attention heads causally responsible for toxic generation. Using the Probability of Necessity and Sufficiency (PNS), we isolate a minimal set of heads that are necessary and sufficient for toxicity. We utilize these components via two complementary strategies: (1) Local Inference-Time Intervention, which constructs dynamic, input-specific steering vectors for context-aware detoxification, and (2) PNS-Guided Fine-Tuning, which permanently unlearns toxic representations. We also introduce PARATOX, a novel benchmark of aligned toxic/non-toxic sentence pairs enabling controlled counterfactual evaluation. Experiments on ToxiGen, ImplicitHate, and ParaDetox show that CAUSALDETOX achieves up to 5.34% greater toxicity reduction compared to baselines while preserving linguistic fluency, and offers a 7x speedup in head selection.

AI.tldr: 提出CAUSALDETOX框架，通过因果头部选择和干预实现语言模型去毒化，减少有害内容生成
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型经常生成有害内容，现有缓解策略会降低生成质量或需要昂贵的人工标注，需要更有效的去毒化方法
AI.method: 使用概率必要性和充分性识别导致有害生成的具体注意力头，通过局部推理时干预和PNS引导微调两种互补策略进行干预
AI.result: 在ToxiGen、ImplicitHate和ParaDetox数据集上，CAUSALDETOX相比基线实现高达5.34%的有害性降低，同时保持语言流畅性，头部选择速度提升7倍
AI.conclusion: CAUSALDETOX框架通过因果头部识别和干预有效减少语言模型有害内容生成，在保持生成质量的同时提供高效的去毒化解决方案

title: Mechanistic Decoding of Cognitive Constructs in LLMs
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate increasingly sophisticated affective capabilities, the internal mechanisms by which they process complex emotions remain unclear. Existing interpretability approaches often treat models as black boxes or focus on coarse-grained basic emotions, leaving the cognitive structure of more complex affective states underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose a Cognitive Reverse-Engineering framework based on Representation Engineering (RepE) to analyze social-comparison jealousy. By combining appraisal theory with subspace orthogonalization, regression-based weighting, and bidirectional causal steering, we isolate and quantify two psychological antecedents of jealousy, Superiority of Comparison Person and Domain Self-Definitional Relevance, and examine their causal effects on model judgments. Experiments on eight LLMs from the Llama, Qwen, and Gemma families suggest that models natively encode jealousy as a structured linear combination of these constituent factors. Their internal representations are broadly consistent with the human psychological construct, treating Superiority as the foundational trigger and Relevance as the ultimate intensity multiplier. Our framework also demonstrates that toxic emotional states can be mechanically detected and surgically suppressed, suggesting a possible route toward representational monitoring and intervention for AI safety in multi-agent environments.

AI.tldr: 提出基于表征工程的认知逆向工程框架，分析大型语言模型中社会比较嫉妒的内部机制
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法将模型视为黑箱或仅关注基本情绪，对复杂情感状态的认知结构探索不足，需要理解LLMs处理复杂情绪的内部机制
AI.method: 结合评价理论与子空间正交化、回归加权和双向因果导向，分离并量化嫉妒的两个心理前因：比较对象优越性和领域自我定义相关性
AI.result: 在Llama、Qwen和Gemma家族的八个LLMs上实验表明，模型将嫉妒编码为这些构成因素的线性组合，内部表征与人类心理结构一致，优越性是基础触发因素，相关性是强度乘数
AI.conclusion: 框架可机械检测并抑制有毒情绪状态，为多智能体环境中的AI安全提供表征监控和干预的可能途径

title: Prompt-Guided Image Editing with Masked Logit Nudging in Visual Autoregressive Models
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Findings (CVPRF)
summary: We address the problem of prompt-guided image editing in visual autoregressive models. Given a source image and a target text prompt, we aim to modify the source image according to the target prompt, while preserving all regions which are unrelated to the requested edit. To this end, we present Masked Logit Nudging, which uses the source image token maps to introduce a guidance step that aligns the model's predictions under the target prompt with these source token maps. Specifically, we convert the fixed source encodings into logits using the VAR encoding, nudging the model's predicted logits towards the targets along a semantic trajectory defined by the source-target prompts. Edits are applied only within spatial masks obtained through a dedicated masking scheme that leverages cross-attention differences between the source and edited prompts. Then, we introduce a refinement to correct quantization errors and improve reconstruction quality. Our approach achieves the best image editing performance on the PIE benchmark at 512px and 1024px resolutions. Beyond editing, our method delivers faithful reconstructions and outperforms previous methods on COCO at 512px and OpenImages at 1024px. Overall, our method outperforms VAR-related approaches and achieves comparable or even better performance than diffusion models, while being much faster. Code is available at 'https://github.com/AmirMaEl/MLN'.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于掩码对数引导的提示指导图像编辑方法，用于视觉自回归模型中的图像编辑任务。
AI.motivation: 解决在视觉自回归模型中根据目标文本提示编辑源图像的问题，同时保留与编辑请求无关的所有区域，实现精确的局部编辑。
AI.method: 提出掩码对数引导方法，利用源图像标记图引入引导步骤，使模型在目标提示下的预测与源标记图对齐；通过专用掩码方案获取空间掩码，仅编辑掩码内区域；引入细化步骤纠正量化误差。
AI.result: 在PIE基准测试的512px和1024px分辨率上取得最佳图像编辑性能；在COCO 512px和OpenImages 1024px上优于先前方法；比扩散模型快得多，性能相当或更好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在视觉自回归模型中实现了高效的提示指导图像编辑，在保持高质量重建的同时显著提升编辑性能，为图像编辑任务提供了快速有效的解决方案。

title: AgileLog: A Forkable Shared Log for Agents on Data Streams
summary: In modern data-streaming systems, alongside traditional programs, a new type of entity has emerged that can interact with streaming data: AI agents. Unlike traditional programs, AI agents use LLM reasoning to accomplish high-level tasks specified in natural language over streaming data. Unfortunately, current streaming systems cannot fully support agents: they lack the fundamental mechanisms to avoid the performance interference caused by agentic tasks and to safely handle agentic writes. We argue that the shared log, the core abstraction underlying streaming data, must support creating forks of itself, and that such a forkable shared log serves as a great substrate for agents acting on streaming data. We propose AgileLog, a new shared log abstraction that provides novel forking primitives for agentic use cases. We design Bolt, an implementation of the AgileLog abstraction, that uses novel techniques to make forks cheap, and provide logical and performance isolation.

AI.tldr: 提出AgileLog，一种支持分叉的共享日志抽象，用于在数据流系统中支持AI代理的高效安全运行
AI.motivation: 当前流处理系统无法完全支持AI代理：缺乏避免代理任务性能干扰的机制，以及安全处理代理写入的能力
AI.method: 设计AgileLog共享日志抽象，提供新颖的分叉原语；实现Bolt系统，采用新技术使分叉成本低廉，并提供逻辑和性能隔离
AI.result: 开发了Bolt系统作为AgileLog的实现，使分叉操作变得廉价，并为代理用例提供了逻辑和性能隔离
AI.conclusion: 可分叉的共享日志是支持数据流上AI代理的理想底层抽象，AgileLog为此类应用提供了有效的解决方案

title: CPGRec+: A Balance-oriented Framework for Personalized Video Game Recommendations
comment: Published in ACM Transactions on Information Systems (TOIS). 43 pages, 9 figures
summary: The rapid expansion of gaming industry requires advanced recommender systems tailored to its dynamic landscape. Existing Graph Neural Network (GNN)-based methods primarily prioritize accuracy over diversity, overlooking their inherent trade-off. To address this, we previously proposed CPGRec, a balance-oriented gaming recommender system. However, CPGRec fails to account for critical disparities in player-game interactions, which carry varying significance in reflecting players' personal preferences and may exacerbate over-smoothness issues inherent in GNN-based models. Moreover, existing approaches underutilize the reasoning capabilities and extensive knowledge of large language models (LLMs) in addressing these limitations. To bridge this gap, we propose two new modules. First, Preference-informed Edge Reweighting (PER) module assigns signed edge weights to qualitatively distinguish significant player interests and disinterests while then quantitatively measuring preference strength to mitigate over-smoothing in graph convolutions. Second, Preference-informed Representation Generation (PRG) module leverages LLMs to generate contextualized descriptions of games and players by reasoning personal preferences from comparing global and personal interests, thereby refining representations of players and games. Experiments on \textcolor{black}{two Steam datasets} demonstrate CPGRec+'s superior accuracy and diversity over state-of-the-art models. The code is accessible at https://github.com/HsipingLi/CPGRec-Plus.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPGRec+框架，旨在平衡准确性与多样性，为个性化视频游戏推荐提供优化方案。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的方法主要关注准确性而忽视多样性，且未充分考虑玩家-游戏交互中的重要性差异，同时未能充分利用大语言模型的推理能力来解决这些限制。
AI.method: 提出两个新模块：偏好感知边重加权模块通过分配带符号边权重区分重要兴趣与不兴趣；偏好感知表示生成模块利用大语言模型生成游戏和玩家的情境化描述，通过比较全局与个人兴趣来精炼表示。
AI.result: 在两个Steam数据集上的实验表明，CPGRec+在准确性和多样性方面均优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: CPGRec+通过结合图神经网络与大语言模型，有效解决了游戏推荐中准确性与多样性的平衡问题，并缓解了过平滑现象。

title: Prompt Optimization Is a Coin Flip: Diagnosing When It Helps in Compound AI Systems
summary: Prompt optimization in compound AI systems is statistically indistinguishable from a coin flip: across 72 optimization runs on Claude Haiku (6 methods $\times$ 4 tasks $\times$ 3 repeats), 49% score below zero-shot; on Amazon Nova Lite, the failure rate is even higher. Yet on one task, all six methods improve over zero-shot by up to $+6.8$ points. What distinguishes success from failure? We investigate with 18,000 grid evaluations and 144 optimization runs, testing two assumptions behind end-to-end optimization tools like TextGrad and DSPy: (A) individual prompts are worth optimizing, and (B) agent prompts interact, requiring joint optimization. Interaction effects are never significant ($p > 0.52$, all $F < 1.0$), and optimization helps only when the task has exploitable output structure -- a format the model can produce but does not default to. We provide a two-stage diagnostic: an \$80 ANOVA pre-test for agent coupling, and a 10-minute headroom test that predicts whether optimization is worthwhile -- turning a coin flip into an informed decision.

AI.tldr: 本文研究复合AI系统中提示优化的有效性，诊断其何时能带来实际改进而非随机结果
AI.motivation: 当前复合AI系统中的提示优化工具（如TextGrad和DSPy）假设提示值得优化且需要联合优化，但这些假设缺乏实证支持，优化结果往往与随机抛硬币无异
AI.method: 通过大规模实验（18,000次网格评估和144次优化运行），测试两个核心假设，并开发两阶段诊断方法：80美元ANOVA预测试和10分钟上限测试
AI.result: 提示优化在多数情况下无效（Claude Haiku上49%低于零样本，Amazon Nova Lite失败率更高），仅在任务具有可开发输出结构时有效；交互效应不显著（p>0.52），优化仅当模型能产生但默认不产生特定格式时有效
AI.conclusion: 提示优化不是普遍有效的，仅在特定条件下有价值；提出的两阶段诊断方法能将随机决策转变为基于证据的决策，帮助研究人员判断何时值得进行提示优化

title: MapSR: Prompt-Driven Land Cover Map Super-Resolution via Vision Foundation Models
summary: High-resolution (HR) land-cover mapping is often constrained by the high cost of dense HR annotations. We revisit this problem from the perspective of map super-resolution, which enhances coarse low-resolution (LR) land-cover products into HR maps at the resolution of the input imagery. Existing weakly supervised methods can leverage LR labels, but they typically use them to retrain dense predictors with substantial computational cost. We propose MapSR, a prompt-driven framework that decouples supervision from model training. MapSR uses LR labels once to extract class prompts from frozen vision foundation model features through a lightweight linear probe, after which HR mapping proceeds via training-free metric inference and graph-based prediction refinement. Specifically, class prompts are estimated by aggregating high-confidence HR features identified by the linear probe, and HR predictions are obtained by cosine-similarity matching followed by graph-based propagation for spatial refinement. Experiments on the Chesapeake Bay dataset show that MapSR achieves 59.64% mIoU without any HR labels, remaining competitive with the strongest weakly supervised baseline and surpassing a fully supervised baseline. Notably, MapSR reduces trainable parameters by four orders of magnitude and shortens training time from hours to minutes, enabling scalable HR mapping under limited annotation and compute budgets. The code is available at https://github.com/rikirikirikiriki/MapSR.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MapSR框架，通过视觉基础模型实现提示驱动的土地覆盖图超分辨率，将低分辨率土地覆盖产品增强为高分辨率地图。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率土地覆盖制图受限于密集高分辨率标注的高成本，现有弱监督方法需要大量计算资源重新训练密集预测器，需要更高效的方法。
AI.method: MapSR采用提示驱动框架，通过轻量级线性探针从冻结视觉基础模型特征中提取类别提示，然后进行无训练度量推理和图基预测细化，实现高分辨率映射。
AI.result: 在Chesapeake Bay数据集上，MapSR在无高分辨率标签情况下达到59.64% mIoU，与最强弱监督基线竞争，超越全监督基线，参数减少四个数量级，训练时间从小时缩短到分钟。
AI.conclusion: MapSR框架在有限标注和计算预算下实现了可扩展的高分辨率土地覆盖制图，显著降低了计算成本和训练时间。

title: TurboTalk: Progressive Distillation for One-Step Audio-Driven Talking Avatar Generation
summary: Existing audio-driven video digital human generation models rely on multi-step denoising, resulting in substantial computational overhead that severely limits their deployment in real-world settings. While one-step distillation approaches can significantly accelerate inference, they often suffer from training instability. To address this challenge, we propose TurboTalk, a two-stage progressive distillation framework that effectively compresses a multi-step audio-driven video diffusion model into a single-step generator. We first adopt Distribution Matching Distillation to obtain a strong and stable 4-step student, and then progressively reduce the denoising steps from 4 to 1 through adversarial distillation. To ensure stable training under extreme step reduction, we introduce a progressive timestep sampling strategy and a self-compare adversarial objective that provides an intermediate adversarial reference that stabilizes progressive distillation. Our method achieve single-step generation of video talking avatar, boosting inference speed by 120 times while maintaining high generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TurboTalk框架，通过渐进式蒸馏将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型压缩为单步生成器，实现音频驱动说话头像的一步生成。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动视频数字人生成模型依赖多步去噪，计算开销大，限制了实际部署。一步蒸馏方法虽能加速推理，但存在训练不稳定问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段渐进蒸馏框架：首先通过分布匹配蒸馏获得稳定的4步学生模型，然后通过对抗蒸馏逐步将去噪步数从4减少到1。引入渐进时间步采样策略和自比较对抗目标来稳定训练。
AI.result: 实现了说话头像的单步生成，推理速度提升120倍，同时保持高质量生成效果。
AI.conclusion: TurboTalk框架成功解决了音频驱动说话头像生成中的计算效率问题，通过渐进蒸馏实现了高质量的单步生成，具有实际部署价值。

title: Enhancing Mental Health Counseling Support in Bangladesh using Culturally-Grounded Knowledge
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in generating supportive responses for mental health and counseling applications. However, their responses often lack cultural sensitivity, contextual grounding, and clinically appropriate guidance. This work addresses the gap of how to systematically incorporate domain-specific, clinically validated knowledge into LLMs to improve counseling quality. We utilize and compare two approaches, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and a knowledge graph (KG)-based method, designed to support para-counselors. Our KG is constructed manually and clinically validated, capturing causal relationships between stressors, interventions, and outcomes, with contributions from multidisciplinary people. We evaluated multiple LLMs in both settings using BERTScore F1 and SBERT cosine similarity, as well as human evaluation across five metrics, which is designed to directly measure the effectiveness of counseling beyond similarity at the surface level. The results show that KG-based approaches consistently improve contextual relevance, clinical appropriateness, and practical usability compared to RAG alone, demonstrating that structured, expert-validated knowledge plays a critical role in addressing LLMs limitations in counseling tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是研究如何将领域特定的临床验证知识系统性地整合到大型语言模型中，以提升孟加拉国心理健康咨询支持的质量，特别关注文化敏感性和临床适当性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在心理健康咨询应用中显示出潜力，但其回应往往缺乏文化敏感性、情境基础和临床适当指导。现有方法在将临床验证知识整合到LLMs中缺乏系统性，特别是在跨文化心理健康支持方面存在不足。
AI.method: 研究采用并比较了两种方法：检索增强生成（RAG）和基于知识图谱（KG）的方法。KG是手动构建并经过临床验证的，捕捉了压力源、干预措施和结果之间的因果关系，由多学科团队贡献。评估了多种LLMs，使用BERTScore F1和SBERT余弦相似度，以及包含五个指标的人工评估。
AI.result: 结果显示，与单独的RAG相比，基于知识图谱的方法在情境相关性、临床适当性和实际可用性方面持续改进。结构化、专家验证的知识在解决LLMs在咨询任务中的局限性方面发挥了关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、专家验证的知识对于提升LLMs在心理健康咨询任务中的表现至关重要，特别是在文化敏感性和临床适当性方面。基于知识图谱的方法比检索增强生成更有效地整合了临床专业知识，为跨文化心理健康支持提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Generative Augmented Inference
summary: Data-driven operations management often relies on parameters estimated from costly human-generated labels. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and other AI systems offer inexpensive auxiliary data, but introduce a new challenge: AI outputs are not direct observations of the target outcomes, but could involve high-dimensional representations with complex and unknown relationships to human labels. Conventional methods leverage AI predictions as direct proxies for true labels, which can be inefficient or unreliable when this relationship is weak or misspecified. We propose Generative Augmented Inference (GAI), a general framework that incorporates AI-generated outputs as informative features for estimating models of human-labeled outcomes. GAI uses an orthogonal moment construction that enables consistent estimation and valid inference with flexible, nonparametric relationship between LLM-generated outputs and human labels. We establish asymptotic normality and show a "safe default" property: relative to human-data-only estimators, GAI weakly improves estimation efficiency under arbitrary auxiliary signals and yields strict gains whenever the auxiliary information is predictive. Empirically, GAI outperforms benchmarks across diverse settings. In conjoint analysis with weak auxiliary signals, GAI reduces estimation error by about 50% and lowers human labeling requirements by over 75%. In retail pricing, where all methods access the same auxiliary inputs, GAI consistently outperforms alternative estimators, highlighting the value of its construction rather than differences in information. In health insurance choice, it cuts labeling requirements by over 90% while maintaining decision accuracy. Across applications, GAI improves confidence interval coverage without inflating width. Overall, GAI provides a principled and scalable approach to integrating AI-generated information.

AI.tldr: 提出生成增强推断（GAI）框架，将AI生成输出作为信息特征来估计人类标注结果的模型，解决传统方法将AI预测直接作为真实标签代理的低效不可靠问题。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的运营管理依赖昂贵的人工标注参数估计，而大型语言模型等AI系统提供廉价辅助数据，但AI输出并非目标结果的直接观测，可能包含与人类标签复杂未知的高维关系。传统方法将AI预测作为真实标签的直接代理，当这种关系较弱或错误设定时效率低下且不可靠。
AI.method: 提出生成增强推断（GAI）框架，使用正交矩构造，允许LLM生成输出与人类标签之间灵活的非参数关系，实现一致估计和有效推断。该方法具有"安全默认"特性：相对于仅使用人类数据的估计器，在任意辅助信号下都能弱化估计效率，当辅助信息具有预测性时获得严格增益。
AI.result: 在多种实证应用中表现出色：在具有弱辅助信号的联合分析中，GAI减少约50%的估计误差，降低超过75%的人工标注需求；在零售定价中，所有方法使用相同辅助输入时，GAI持续优于替代估计器；在健康保险选择中，减少超过90%的标注需求同时保持决策准确性。在所有应用中，GAI改善置信区间覆盖而不增加宽度。
AI.conclusion: GAI提供了一个原则性和可扩展的方法来整合AI生成信息，通过将AI输出作为信息特征而非直接代理，在保持统计有效性的同时显著减少人工标注成本，为数据驱动的运营管理提供了更高效的参数估计框架。

title: M3D-Net: Multi-Modal 3D Facial Feature Reconstruction Network for Deepfake Detection
summary: With the rapid advancement of deep learning in image generation, facial forgery techniques have achieved unprecedented realism, posing serious threats to cybersecurity and information authenticity. Most existing deepfake detection approaches rely on the reconstruction of isolated facial attributes without fully exploiting the complementary nature of multi-modal feature representations. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel Multi-Modal 3D Facial Feature Reconstruction Network (M3D-Net) for deepfake detection. Our method leverages an end-to-end dual-stream architecture that reconstructs fine-grained facial geometry and reflectance properties from single-view RGB images via a self-supervised 3D facial reconstruction module. The network further enhances detection performance through a 3D Feature Pre-fusion Module (PFM), which adaptively adjusts multi-scale features, and a Multi-modal Fusion Module (MFM) that effectively integrates RGB and 3D-reconstructed features using attention mechanisms. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of detection accuracy and robustness, significantly outperforming existing methods while exhibiting strong generalization across diverse scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于深度伪造检测的多模态3D面部特征重建网络，通过重建细粒度面部几何和反射属性来检测伪造面部图像。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习图像生成技术的快速发展，面部伪造技术达到了前所未有的真实度，对网络安全和信息真实性构成严重威胁。现有深度伪造检测方法大多依赖孤立面部属性的重建，未能充分利用多模态特征表示的互补性。
AI.method: 提出M3D-Net网络，采用端到端双流架构，通过自监督3D面部重建模块从单视角RGB图像重建细粒度面部几何和反射属性。网络包含3D特征预融合模块自适应调整多尺度特征，以及多模态融合模块使用注意力机制有效整合RGB和3D重建特征。
AI.result: 在多个公共数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在检测准确性和鲁棒性方面达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法，并在多样化场景中表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: M3D-Net通过多模态3D面部特征重建有效提升了深度伪造检测性能，为解决面部伪造检测问题提供了一种创新且高效的解决方案。

title: Don't Retrieve, Navigate: Distilling Enterprise Knowledge into Navigable Agent Skills for QA and RAG
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds LLM responses in external evidence but treats the model as a passive consumer of search results: it never sees how the corpus is organized or what it has not yet retrieved, limiting its ability to backtrack or combine scattered evidence. We present Corpus2Skill, which distills a document corpus into a hierarchical skill directory offline and lets an LLM agent navigate it at serve time. The compilation pipeline iteratively clusters documents, generates LLM-written summaries at each level, and materializes the result as a tree of navigable skill files. At serve time, the agent receives a bird's-eye view of the corpus, drills into topic branches via progressively finer summaries, and retrieves full documents by ID. Because the hierarchy is explicitly visible, the agent can reason about where to look, backtrack from unproductive paths, and combine evidence across branches. On WixQA, an enterprise customer-support benchmark for RAG, Corpus2Skill outperforms dense retrieval, RAPTOR, and agentic RAG baselines across all quality metrics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Corpus2Skill的方法，将企业文档语料库蒸馏为可导航的技能目录，使LLM代理能够在推理时主动导航而非被动检索。
AI.motivation: 传统检索增强生成(RAG)将LLM视为搜索结果被动消费者，模型无法看到语料库的组织结构或未检索到的内容，限制了回溯或整合分散证据的能力。
AI.method: Corpus2Skill方法离线将文档语料库蒸馏为分层技能目录：迭代聚类文档，在每个层级生成LLM编写的摘要，并将结果物化为可导航技能文件的树状结构。
AI.result: 在企业客户支持基准WixQA上，Corpus2Skill在各项质量指标上均优于密集检索、RAPTOR和基于代理的RAG基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将语料库显式组织为可导航层次结构，使LLM代理能够主动推理搜索位置、回溯无效路径并跨分支整合证据，显著提升了问答和RAG性能。

title: Deepfake Detection Generalization with Diffusion Noise
summary: Deepfake detectors face growing challenges in generalization as new image synthesis techniques emerge. In particular, deepfakes generated by diffusion models are highly photorealistic and often evade detectors trained on GAN-based forgeries. This paper addresses the generalization problem in deepfake detection by leveraging diffusion noise characteristics. We propose an Attention-guided Noise Learning (ANL) framework that integrates a pre-trained diffusion model into the deepfake detection pipeline to guide the learning of more robust features. Specifically, our method uses the diffusion model's denoising process to expose subtle artifacts: the detector is trained to predict the noise contained in an input image at a given diffusion step, forcing it to capture discrepancies between real and synthetic images, while an attention-guided mechanism derived from the predicted noise is introduced to encourage the model to focus on globally distributed discrepancies rather than local patterns. By harnessing the frozen diffusion model's learned distribution of natural images, the ANL method acts as a form of regularization, improving the detector's generalization to unseen forgery types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ANL significantly outperforms existing methods on multiple benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy in detecting diffusion-generated deepfakes. Notably, the proposed framework boosts generalization performance (e.g., improving ACC/AP by a substantial margin on unseen models) without introducing additional overhead during inference. Our results highlight that diffusion noise provides a powerful signal for generalizable deepfake detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散噪声的深度伪造检测泛化方法，通过利用扩散模型的噪声特征来提升检测器对新型伪造技术的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 随着扩散模型等新型图像合成技术的出现，深度伪造检测器面临泛化能力不足的问题，特别是扩散模型生成的深度伪造图像具有高度真实感，能够逃避基于GAN伪造训练的检测器。
AI.method: 提出注意力引导噪声学习（ANL）框架，将预训练扩散模型集成到深度伪造检测流程中，利用扩散去噪过程揭示细微伪影，训练检测器预测输入图像在特定扩散步骤中的噪声，并引入基于预测噪声的注意力引导机制使模型关注全局分布差异而非局部模式。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，ANL方法显著优于现有方法，在检测扩散生成的深度伪造方面达到最先进准确率，显著提升对未见伪造模型的泛化性能（ACC/AP指标大幅提升），且推理时不引入额外开销。
AI.conclusion: 扩散噪声为可泛化的深度伪造检测提供了强大信号，通过利用冻结扩散模型学习的自然图像分布，ANL方法作为一种正则化形式，有效提升了检测器对未见伪造类型的泛化能力。

title: Learning Adaptive Reasoning Paths for Efficient Visual Reasoning
summary: Visual reasoning models (VRMs) have recently shown strong cross-modal reasoning capabilities by integrating visual perception with language reasoning. However, they often suffer from overthinking, producing unnecessarily long reasoning chains for any tasks. We attribute this issue to \textbf{Reasoning Path Redundancy} in visual reasoning: many visual questions do not require the full reasoning process. To address this, we propose \textbf{AVR}, an adaptive visual reasoning framework that decomposes visual reasoning into three cognitive functions: visual perception, logical reasoning, and answer application. It further enables models to dynamically choose among three response formats: Full Format, Perception-Only Format, and Direct Answer. AVR is trained with FS-GRPO, an adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization that encourages the model to select the most efficient reasoning format while preserving correctness. Experiments on multiple vision-language benchmarks show that AVR reduces token usage by 50--90\% while maintaining overall accuracy, especially in perception-intensive tasks. These results demonstrate that adaptive visual reasoning can effectively mitigate overthinking in VRMs. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/RunRiotComeOn/AVR.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应视觉推理框架AVR，通过动态选择推理路径来解决视觉推理模型中的过度思考问题，提高推理效率。
AI.motivation: 视觉推理模型存在过度思考问题，为所有任务生成不必要的长推理链，导致推理路径冗余，需要更高效的推理方法。
AI.method: 将视觉推理分解为视觉感知、逻辑推理和答案应用三个认知功能，并设计三种响应格式：完整格式、仅感知格式和直接答案。使用FS-GRPO训练模型动态选择最有效的推理格式。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言基准测试中，AVR将token使用量减少50-90%，同时保持整体准确性，特别是在感知密集型任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 自适应视觉推理能有效缓解视觉推理模型中的过度思考问题，通过动态选择推理路径实现高效推理，平衡准确性和效率。

title: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning Exploits Passive Body Dynamics for High-Performance Biped Robot Locomotion
summary: Embodiment is a significant keyword in recent machine learning fields. This study focused on the passive nature of the body of a biped robot to generate walking and running locomotion using model-based deep reinforcement learning. We constructed two models in a simulator, one with passive elements (e.g., springs) and the other, which is similar to general humanoids, without passive elements. The training of the model with passive elements was highly affected by the attractor of the system. This lead that although the trajectories quickly converged to limit cycles, it took a long time to obtain large rewards. However, thanks to the attractor-driven learning, the acquired locomotion was robust and energy-efficient. The results revealed that robots with passive elements could efficiently acquire high-performance locomotion by utilizing stable limit cycles generated through dynamic interaction between the body and ground. This study demonstrates the importance of implementing passive properties in the body for future embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 研究通过模型强化学习利用双足机器人被动身体动力学实现高性能行走和奔跑运动
AI.motivation: 探索机器人身体被动特性在机器学习中的重要性，研究如何利用被动动力学提高双足机器人运动性能
AI.method: 在模拟器中构建两种模型：一种包含被动元件（如弹簧），另一种类似通用人形机器人不含被动元件，使用模型深度强化学习进行训练
AI.result: 含被动元件模型受系统吸引子影响大，轨迹快速收敛到极限环但获得高奖励耗时较长；吸引子驱动学习使获得的运动更鲁棒且能量效率高
AI.conclusion: 具有被动元件的机器人能通过身体与地面动态交互产生的稳定极限环高效获得高性能运动，证明了在身体中实现被动特性对未来具身AI的重要性

title: MARS$^2$: Scaling Multi-Agent Tree Search via Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) paradigms have demonstrated strong performance on reasoning-intensive tasks such as code generation. However, limited trajectory diversity often leads to diminishing returns, which constrains the achievable performance ceiling. Search-enhanced RL alleviates this issue by introducing structured exploration, which remains constrained by the single-agent policy priors. Meanwhile, leveraging multiple interacting policies can acquire more diverse exploratory signals, but existing approaches are typically decoupled from structured search. We propose \textbf{MARS$^2$} (Multi-Agent Reinforced Tree-Search Scaling), a unified RL framework in which multiple independently-optimized agents collaborate within a shared tree-structured search environment. MARS$^2$ models the search tree as a learnable multi-agent interaction environment, enabling heterogeneous agents to collaboratively generate and refine candidate solutions within a shared search topology. To support effective learning, we introduce a path-level group advantage formulation based on tree-consistent reward shaping, which facilitates effective credit assignment across complex search trajectories. Experiments on code generation benchmarks show that MARS$^2$ consistently improves performance across diverse model combinations and training settings, demonstrating the effectiveness of coupling multi-agent collaboration with tree search for enhancing reinforcement learning. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/TsinghuaC3I/MARTI.

AI.tldr: 提出MARS²框架，通过多智能体强化学习与树搜索结合来提升代码生成任务的性能
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在代码生成等推理密集型任务中，由于轨迹多样性有限导致性能瓶颈；单智能体树搜索受限于单一策略先验，而现有多智能体方法缺乏结构化搜索机制
AI.method: 提出MARS²框架，将搜索树建模为可学习的多智能体交互环境，让多个独立优化的智能体在共享树结构搜索环境中协作；引入基于树一致奖励塑形的路径级群体优势公式，实现复杂搜索轨迹的有效信用分配
AI.result: 在代码生成基准测试中，MARS²在不同模型组合和训练设置下均能持续提升性能，验证了多智能体协作与树搜索结合增强强化学习的有效性
AI.conclusion: MARS²框架成功地将多智能体协作与结构化树搜索相结合，为强化学习在代码生成等复杂任务中提供了更有效的探索和优化机制

title: Revisiting Token Compression for Accelerating ViT-based Sparse Multi-View 3D Object Detectors
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT)-based sparse multi-view 3D object detectors have achieved remarkable accuracy but still suffer from high inference latency due to heavy token processing. To accelerate these models, token compression has been widely explored. However, our revisit of existing strategies, such as token pruning, merging, and patch size enlargement, reveals that they often discard informative background cues, disrupt contextual consistency, and lose fine-grained semantics, negatively affecting 3D detection. To overcome these limitations, we propose SEPatch3D, a novel framework that dynamically adjusts patch sizes while preserving critical semantic information within coarse patches. Specifically, we design Spatiotemporal-aware Patch Size Selection (SPSS) that assigns small patches to scenes containing nearby objects to preserve fine details and large patches to background-dominated scenes to reduce computation cost. To further mitigate potential detail loss, Informative Patch Selection (IPS) selects the informative patches for feature refinement, and Cross-Granularity Feature Enhancement (CGFE) injects fine-grained details into selected coarse patches, enriching semantic features. Experiments on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 validation sets show that SEPatch3D achieves up to \textbf{57\%} faster inference than the StreamPETR baseline and \textbf{20\%} higher efficiency than the state-of-the-art ToC3D-faster, while preserving comparable detection accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Mingqj/SEPatch3D.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEPatch3D框架，通过动态调整ViT补丁大小来加速基于稀疏多视图的3D目标检测器，同时保持检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT-based稀疏多视图3D目标检测器虽然精度高，但推理延迟大。现有token压缩方法（如token剪枝、合并、增大补丁尺寸）会丢失背景信息、破坏上下文一致性、损失细粒度语义，影响3D检测性能。
AI.method: 提出SEPatch3D框架：1) 时空感知补丁大小选择(SPSS)，根据场景动态分配不同尺寸补丁；2) 信息补丁选择(IPS)，筛选信息丰富的补丁进行特征细化；3) 跨粒度特征增强(CGFE)，将细粒度细节注入粗粒度补丁。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2验证集上，SEPatch3D比StreamPETR基线推理速度快57%，比当前最优的ToC3D-faster效率高20%，同时保持可比的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: SEPatch3D通过动态调整补丁大小和特征增强机制，在显著加速ViT-based稀疏多视图3D检测器的同时，有效保持了检测精度，解决了现有token压缩方法的局限性。

title: DVFace: Spatio-Temporal Dual-Prior Diffusion for Video Face Restoration
summary: Video face restoration aims to enhance degraded face videos into high-quality results with realistic facial details, stable identity, and temporal coherence. Recent diffusion-based methods have brought strong generative priors to restoration and enabled more realistic detail synthesis. However, existing approaches for face videos still rely heavily on generic diffusion priors and multi-step sampling, which limit both facial adaptation and inference efficiency. These limitations motivate the use of one-step diffusion for video face restoration, yet achieving faithful facial recovery alongside temporally stable outputs remains challenging. In this paper, we propose, DVFace, a one-step diffusion framework for real-world video face restoration. Specifically, we introduce a spatio-temporal dual-codebook design to extract complementary spatial and temporal facial priors from degraded videos. We further propose an asymmetric spatio-temporal fusion module to inject these priors into the diffusion backbone according to their distinct roles. Evaluation on various benchmarks shows that DVFace delivers superior restoration quality, temporal consistency, and identity preservation compared to recent methods. Code: https://github.com/zhengchen1999/DVFace.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DVFace，一种用于视频人脸修复的一步扩散框架，旨在将退化的面部视频增强为高质量结果，具有真实的面部细节、稳定的身份特征和时间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的方法严重依赖通用扩散先验和多步采样，限制了面部适应性和推理效率。虽然一步扩散能提高效率，但实现忠实的面部恢复和时序稳定输出仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出时空双码本设计，从退化视频中提取互补的空间和时间面部先验；设计非对称时空融合模块，根据先验的不同角色将其注入扩散主干网络。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的评估表明，DVFace相比现有方法在恢复质量、时间一致性和身份保持方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: DVFace通过时空双先验扩散框架，成功实现了高效且高质量的视频人脸修复，在恢复质量、时序稳定性和身份保持方面均优于现有方法。

authors: et al. (128 additional authors not shown)
title: The Fourth Challenge on Image Super-Resolution ($\times$4) at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 image super-resolution ($\times$4) challenge, one of the associated competitions of the NTIRE 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026. The challenge aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a $\times$4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective super-resolution solutions and analyze recent advances in the field. To reflect the evolving objectives of image super-resolution, the challenge includes two tracks: (1) a restoration track, which emphasizes pixel-wise fidelity and ranks submissions based on PSNR; and (2) a perceptual track, which focuses on visual realism and evaluates results using a perceptual score. A total of 194 participants registered for the challenge, with 31 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, datasets, evaluation protocol, main results, and methods of participating teams. The challenge provides a unified benchmark and offers insights into current progress and future directions in image super-resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026图像超分辨率（×4）挑战赛，该比赛旨在从双三次下采样的低分辨率图像中重建高分辨率图像，包含恢复和感知两个赛道。
AI.motivation: 挑战赛旨在开发有效的超分辨率解决方案，分析该领域的最新进展，反映图像超分辨率不断发展的目标，为研究社区提供统一的基准测试平台。
AI.method: 挑战赛设计包括两个赛道：恢复赛道强调像素级保真度，使用PSNR进行排名；感知赛道关注视觉真实感，使用感知分数进行评估。比赛使用双三次下采样生成低分辨率输入。
AI.result: 共有194名参与者注册，31个团队提交了有效参赛作品。报告总结了挑战赛设计、数据集、评估协议、主要结果以及参赛团队的方法。
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026超分辨率挑战赛为研究社区提供了统一的基准测试，展示了当前进展并为未来方向提供了见解，推动了图像超分辨率领域的发展。

title: Controllable Video Object Insertion via Multiview Priors
summary: Video object insertion is a critical task for dynamically inserting new objects into existing environments. Previous video generation methods focus primarily on synthesizing entire scenes while struggling with ensuring consistent object appearance, spatial alignment, and temporal coherence when inserting objects into existing videos. In this paper, we propose a novel solution for Video Object Insertion, which integrates multi-view object priors to address the common challenges of appearance inconsistency and occlusion handling in dynamic environments. By lifting 2D reference images into multi-view representations and leveraging a dual-path view-consistent conditioning mechanism, our framework ensures stable identity guidance and robust integration across diverse viewpoints. A quality-aware weighting mechanism is also employed to adaptively handle noisy or imperfect inputs. Additionally, we introduce an Integration-Aware Consistency Module that guarantees spatial realism, effectively resolving occlusion and boundary artifacts while maintaining temporal continuity across frames. Experimental results show that our solution significantly improves the quality of video object insertion, providing stable and realistic integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可控视频物体插入方法，通过多视角先验解决现有视频生成方法在插入新物体时面临的外观不一致、空间对齐和时间连贯性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法主要关注合成整个场景，但在将物体插入现有视频时难以保证物体外观一致性、空间对齐和时间连贯性，特别是在动态环境中处理遮挡和边界伪影方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出多视角物体先验集成方法，将2D参考图像提升为多视角表示，采用双路径视角一致条件机制确保稳定身份引导，引入质量感知加权机制处理噪声输入，并使用集成感知一致性模块保证空间真实感。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著提高了视频物体插入的质量，实现了稳定且真实的物体集成，有效解决了遮挡和边界伪影问题，保持了帧间的时间连续性。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成多视角先验和创新的条件机制，该方法为视频物体插入任务提供了一种有效的解决方案，能够生成高质量、外观一致且时间连贯的插入结果。

title: VeriGraphi: A Multi-Agent Framework of Hierarchical RTL Generation for Large Hardware Designs
summary: Generating synthesizable Verilog for large, hierarchical hardware designs remains a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs), which struggle to replicate the structured reasoning that human experts employ when translating complex specifications into RTL. When tasked with producing hierarchical Verilog, LLMs frequently lose context across modules, hallucinate interfaces, fabricate inter-module wiring, and fail to maintain structural coherence - failures that intensify as design complexity grows and specifications involve informal prose, figures, and tables that resist direct operationalization. To address these challenges, we present VeriGraphi, a framework that introduces a spec-anchored Knowledge Graph as the architectural substrate driving the RTL generation pipeline. VeriGraphi constructs a HDA, a structured knowledge graph that explicitly encodes module hierarchy, port-level interfaces, wiring semantics, and inter-module dependencies as first-class graph entities and relations. Built through iterative multi-agent analysis of the specification, this Knowledge Graph provides a deterministic, machine-checkable structural scaffold before code generation. Guided by the KG, a progressive coding module incrementally generates pseudo-code and synthesizable RTL while enforcing interface consistency and dependency correctness at each submodule stage. We evaluate VeriGraphi on a benchmark of three representative specification documents from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and their corresponding implementations, and we present a RV32I processor as a detailed case study to illustrate the full pipeline. The results demonstrate that VeriGraphi enables reliable hierarchical RTL generation with minimal human intervention for RISC-V, marking a significant milestone for LLM-generated hardware design while maintaining strong functional correctness.

AI.tldr: 提出VeriGraphi框架，用于生成大型分层硬件设计的可综合Verilog代码，解决LLM在复杂硬件设计中的结构化推理问题。
AI.motivation: LLM在生成大型分层硬件设计的Verilog代码时存在困难，包括上下文丢失、接口幻觉、模块间连线错误和结构一致性差等问题，特别是在处理非正式规范文档时表现不佳。
AI.method: 使用基于规范的知识图谱作为架构基础，构建HDA知识图编码模块层次、端口接口、连线语义和依赖关系，通过多智能体迭代分析规范，渐进式生成伪代码和可综合RTL。
AI.result: 在NIST的三个代表性规范文档及其对应实现上进行评估，以RV32I处理器为案例研究，展示了VeriGraphi能够以最少人工干预可靠生成RISC-V分层RTL代码。
AI.conclusion: VeriGraphi实现了可靠的层次化RTL生成，是LLM生成硬件设计的重要里程碑，保持了强大的功能正确性，为大型硬件设计自动化提供了有效解决方案。

title: VoxSafeBench: Not Just What Is Said, but Who, How, and Where
summary: As speech language models (SLMs) transition from personal devices into shared, multi-user environments, their responses must account for far more than the words alone. Who is speaking, how they sound, and where the conversation takes place can each turn an otherwise benign request into one that is unsafe, unfair, or privacy-violating. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on basic audio comprehension, study individual risks in isolation, or conflate content that is inherently harmful with content that only becomes problematic due to its acoustic context. We introduce VoxSafeBench, among the first benchmarks to jointly evaluate social alignment in SLMs across three dimensions: safety, fairness, and privacy. VoxSafeBench adopts a Two-Tier design: Tier1 evaluates content-centric risks using matched text and audio inputs, while Tier2 targets audio-conditioned risks in which the transcript is benign but the appropriate response hinges on the speaker, paralinguistic cues, or the surrounding environment. To validate Tier2, we include intermediate perception probes and confirm that frontier SLMs can successfully detect these acoustic cues yet still fail to act on them appropriately. Across 22 tasks with bilingual coverage, we find that safeguards appearing robust on text often degrade in speech: safety awareness drops for speaker- and scene-conditioned risks, fairness erodes when demographic differences are conveyed vocally, and privacy protections falter when contextual cues arrive acoustically. Together, these results expose a pervasive speech grounding gap: current SLMs frequently recognize the relevant social norm in text but fail to apply it when the decisive cue must be grounded in speech. Code and data are publicly available at: https://amphionteam.github.io/VoxSafeBench_demopage/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了VoxSafeBench基准测试，用于评估语音语言模型在安全、公平和隐私三个维度的社会对齐能力，特别关注音频上下文如何影响模型响应。
AI.motivation: 随着语音语言模型从个人设备扩展到多用户共享环境，模型响应需要考虑更多因素：说话者身份、语音特征和对话环境。现有基准主要关注基本音频理解能力，孤立研究个体风险，或将固有有害内容与因音频上下文而变得有问题的内容混为一谈。
AI.method: 采用双层设计：Tier1评估内容中心风险，使用匹配的文本和音频输入；Tier2针对音频条件风险，其中文本转录是良性的，但适当响应取决于说话者、副语言线索或环境。包含中间感知探测以验证Tier2，涵盖22个双语任务。
AI.result: 研究发现文本上看似稳健的安全措施在语音中常常失效：对说话者和场景条件风险的安全意识下降，当人口统计差异通过语音传达时公平性受损，当上下文线索以声学方式到达时隐私保护失效。前沿语音语言模型能成功检测这些声学线索但未能适当响应。
AI.conclusion: 当前语音语言模型存在普遍的语音接地差距：模型经常能识别文本中的相关社会规范，但当决定性线索必须基于语音接地时却无法应用。这暴露了现有语音语言模型在多用户环境中社会对齐能力的不足。

title: CT-VIR: Continuous-Time Visual-Inertial-Ranging Fusion for Indoor Localization with Sparse Anchors
summary: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) is widely used for mobile robot localization, but its long-term accuracy degrades without global constraints. Incorporating ranging sensors such as ultra-wideband (UWB) can mitigate drift; however, high-accuracy ranging usually requires well-deployed anchors, which is difficult to ensure in narrow or low-power environments. Moreover, most existing visual-inertial-ranging (VIR) fusion methods rely on discrete time-based filtering or optimization, making it difficult to balance positioning accuracy, trajectory consistency, and fusion efficiency under asynchronous multi-sensor sampling. To address these issues, we propose a spline-based continuous-time state estimation method for VIR fusion localization. In the preprocessing stage, VIO motion priors and UWB ranging measurements are used to construct virtual anchors and reject outliers, thereby alleviating geometric degeneration and improving range reliability. In the estimation stage, the pose trajectory is parameterized in continuous time using a B-spline, while inertial, visual, and ranging constraints are formulated as factors in a sliding-window graph. The spline control points, together with a small set of auxiliary parameters, are then jointly optimized to obtain a continuous-time trajectory estimate. Evaluations on public datasets and real-world experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and practical potential of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于样条的连续时间视觉-惯性-测距融合方法，用于稀疏锚点环境下的室内定位
AI.motivation: 传统视觉惯性里程计长期精度会漂移，而现有视觉-惯性-测距融合方法多为离散时间方法，难以在异步多传感器采样下平衡定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率
AI.method: 采用B样条连续时间参数化位姿轨迹，在预处理阶段利用VIO运动先验和UWB测距构建虚拟锚点并剔除异常值，在估计阶段将惯性、视觉和测距约束作为因子构建滑动窗口图，联合优化样条控制点和辅助参数
AI.result: 在公共数据集和真实世界实验中验证了方法的有效性和实际潜力
AI.conclusion: 提出的连续时间视觉-惯性-测距融合方法能够有效解决稀疏锚点环境下的室内定位问题，提高了定位精度和可靠性

title: Giving Faces Their Feelings Back: Explicit Emotion Control for Feedforward Single-Image 3D Head Avatars
summary: We present a framework for explicit emotion control in feed-forward, single-image 3D head avatar reconstruction. Unlike existing pipelines where emotion is implicitly entangled with geometry or appearance, we treat emotion as a first-class control signal that can be manipulated independently and consistently across identities.
